name: Extended Compute Scaling Analysis (50K Steps, ~12 Hours)
blurb: Scaling analysis of the PR #549 SOTA stack (LeakyReLU² + TTT + Parallel Muon) under extended compute on 4×A100 MIG. 50K steps (~12 hours training) achieves 1.0858 BPB post-TTT (3-seed mean, std 0.0005) with ~14.30MB artifact. Extends the 20K scaling curve showing continued power-law decay and TTT gains scaling with compute (-0.0089 BPB vs -0.0058 at 20K).
author: Jundong Hu
